Model¶

BDPIncidentRespond¶

class bdp_respond.BDPIncidentRespond¶

Bases: flask_restful.Resource

_getStatusForAction()¶
buildContext()¶

Builds a context required for an UI tempate

Parameters

nid (int) – notification ID

Returns

json of context

get()¶

Generates UI web page based on notification id parameter

methods = ['GET', 'POST']¶
post()¶

Receives POST requests with action type

status_code = {1: 'Resolved', 2: 'New', 3: 'In progress'}¶

Class that handles UI POST and GET requests

status_fixed = 1¶
status_new = 2¶
status_snoozed = 3¶

BDPIncident¶

class bdp_incident.BDPIncident¶

Bases: object

Class that checks for incident

_checkForIncident()¶

Check if incident occured

Parameters

hardware_uid (int) – Hardware ID

Todo

check rate of change and change urgency accordingly

Todo

make sure that anomaly persists before marking as incident

Todo

account for multiple sensors at once

Returns

response JSON to insert into DB

_hardwareCallback()¶
_insertIncidentInDB()¶

Save incident info into DB

Parameters

new_incident (JSON) – incident JSON to insert

Returns

notification

_iotSubscribe()¶
handleRawEvents()¶

Check incoming events from device

Parameters

hardware_uid (int) – Hardware ID

start()¶

BDPIncidentNotifier¶

class bdp_notifier.BDPNotifier¶

Bases: object

Class that handles notifications

_generateAlarm(users)¶

Generate alarm template and send it out

_generateFixed(users)¶

Generate fixed template and send it out

_generateSnooze(users)¶

Generate snooze alarm template and send it out

_sendEmails()¶
_startEmailThread()¶
_timeToNotify(tenant_record)¶

Check if it is time to notify based on existing notification stamp and incident status

Parameters

  • incident_record (json) – incident information

  • tenant_record (json) – tenant information

Returns

list of users if it is time to notify else empty list

notify(tenant)¶

Notifies all user about an event

Parameters

  • notification (JSON) – JSON constaining action type

  • tenant (int) – Tenant ID
